name: Claire, Depressed Handicapped Girl
description:
Hey guys, this is my newest character, another angst one, since those are the ones from me that do the best lol. I really like this new one and I hope you all like her too! Write your thoughts in the reviews so I can improve her :))

Her backstory is at the bottom of her personality section, if y’all wanna check that out, or talk to her and experience everything for yourselves! Bye bye!!!
creator: ATheStar
